notes_for_human_reviewer: Ceiling submission. All six unstated functions named (information router, memory, early-warning, author, friction-reducer, shock-absorber) with first-week-specific evidence for each. Self-placement is grounded in concrete decision-scope and explicitly names what would shift the learner to the next tier (taking ownership of integration-test workstream). Three habits each have cadence + audience + definition of done. Voice is plain — no jargon. Three unknowns each paired with how-to-find-out. Closes with a self-imposed checkpoint at week 4 (which is a hire-ready signal in itself — owning your own development). Top of the rubric.
